---
title: "Tableau"
subtitle: "Lab Sessions"
categories: [Tableau]
image_path: "/img/lab/tableau"
---

## Tableau Public

You must create a **Tableau Public account** before working with the tool.

### Steps

1. **Visit the Tableau Public website: **[here](https://www.tableau.com/tableau-login-hub)
   ![Login]({{< meta image_path >}}/1.png)
2. Click **Sign In** (top right).
   ![]({{< meta image_path >}}/2.png)
3. Click **Create one now**.
   ![]({{< meta image_path >}}/3.png)
4. **Enter your:**
   - Email
   - Name
   - Password
   - Choose: `Student`
   ![]({{< meta image_path >}}/4.png)
5. **Accept the terms and click:** `Create account.`
6. Check your email and verify your Tableau account Verification is required before you can publish dashboards.


### Download Tableau Public

Click on the `Create` button sellect Tableau Public in order to effectively publish our dashboards there

![]({{< meta image_path >}}/5.png)

Select the corresponding operating sysem

![]({{< meta image_path >}}/6.png)


## Tableau Desktop

Our main dashboard development application is going to be `Tableau Desktop`. Once we have created the final dashboard, we are going to open it via `Tableau Public` and publish into your public account.

### Sign Up to `Tableau`

Download **Tableau Desktop Public Edition** from the [official website](https://www.tableau.com/products/desktop)

**This time you need to sign out into Tableau account.**

![]({{< meta image_path >}}/7.png)

**As soon as you signed up go to `Products` and download `Tableau Desktop`**

![]({{< meta image_path >}}/8.png)

**Dowload Tableau Desktop**

![]({{< meta image_path >}}/9.png)

**Choose the installer for your operating system:**

- Windows (Tableau Public for Windows)
- macOS (Tableau Public for Mac)



::: {.callout-important}

[This video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fBLJj2AlN9U) shows the exact steps to download and set up **Tableau**

:::
